package rulecoverage

func NegativeDuplicateStructTagKey() string {
    ruleID := "duplicate_struct_tag_key"
    family := "consistency"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Struct field tags that repeat the same key more than once."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
